features.name: VAD Gate Activity Detection
features.description: Core voice activity detection using thresholdAboveFloorDb

features.name: Track Loudness Bias
features.description: Automatic loudness adjustment based on track gain analysis

features.name: Spectral VAD
features.description: Spectral analysis refinement for better voice detection

features.name: Speaker Profile Building
features.description: Builds speaker profiles from fingerprint data

features.name: Speaker Lock Gate
features.description: Locks voice activity to primary speaker profiles

features.name: Laughter Rescue
features.description: Rescues voice segments using laughter detection

features.name: Bleed Suppression
features.description: Suppresses microphone bleed from other tracks

features.name: In-Speech Dropout Healing
features.description: Heals short dropouts within speech segments

features.name: Laughter Continuity Recovery
features.description: Recovers speech continuity using laughter patterns

features.name: Laughter Burst Reinforce
features.description: Reinforces laughter bursts in voice activity

features.name: Always One Track Open
features.description: Ensures at least one track is always open during analysis

features.name: Debug Snapshots
features.description: Captures gate snapshots at various processing stages
